query:
CREATE TABLE card_templates (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  resellerId INT,
  imageUrl TEXT NOT NULL,
  imageKey TEXT,
  
  usernameX INT DEFAULT 50,
  usernameY INT DEFAULT 100,
  usernameFontSize INT DEFAULT 14,
  usernameFontFamily ENUM('normal', 'clear', 'digital') DEFAULT 'normal',
  usernameFontColor VARCHAR(9) DEFAULT '#000000',
  usernameAlign ENUM('left', 'center', 'right') DEFAULT 'left',
  
  passwordX INT DEFAULT 50,
  passwordY INT DEFAULT 130,
  passwordFontSize INT DEFAULT 14,
  passwordFontFamily ENUM('normal', 'clear', 'digital') DEFAULT 'normal',
  passwordFontColor VARCHAR(9) DEFAULT '#000000',
  passwordAlign ENUM('left', 'center', 'right') DEFAULT 'left',
  
  qrCodeEnabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  qrCodeX INT DEFAULT 200,
  qrCodeY INT DEFAULT 50,
  qrCodeSize INT DEFAULT 80,
  qrCodeDomain VARCHAR(255),
  
  cardWidth INT DEFAULT 350,
  cardHeight INT DEFAULT 200,
  
  cardsPerPage INT DEFAULT 8,
  marginTop DECIMAL(4,2) DEFAULT 1.8,
  marginHorizontal DECIMAL(4,2) DEFAULT 1.8,
  columnsPerPage INT DEFAULT 5,
  
  isDefault BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
